title: Reading the Treble Clef
description: Learn the letter names of the lines and spaces specifically for the Treble Clef (G Clef).

sessions.title: Treble Clef: Line Notes
sessions.description: Learn the notes on the five lines of the Treble Clef: E4, G4, B4, D5, F5.
sessions.prompt: Teach the notes on the lines of the Treble Clef: E, G, B, D, F. Use common mnemonics as examples but focus on visual position. Provide interactive exercises that present these line notes randomly and ask the user to play them.

sessions.title: Treble Clef: Space Notes
sessions.description: Learn the notes in the four spaces of the Treble Clef: F4, A4, C5, E5.
sessions.prompt: Teach the notes in the spaces of the Treble Clef: F, A, C, E. Mention mnemonics like 'FACE' as examples. Provide interactive exercises that present space notes randomly for the user to play.

sessions.title: Treble Clef Review
sessions.description: Mix lines and spaces together for the full Treble Clef staff.
sessions.prompt: Combine Treble Clef line and space notes. Provide exercises with melodic fragments spanning from E4 to F5. Focus on step-wise motion and small skips.
